## exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1
Source: Mind2Web exemplar
Website: exploretock
Domain: Travel
Subdomain: Restaurant
Goal pattern: Check for pickup restaurant available in Boston, NY on March 18, 5pm with just one guest
Structured steps:
 - SELECT target_role=combobox target_label=Reservation type value=Pickup example=SELECT [136] [Pickup]
<action>
SELECT [136] [Pickup]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=svg target_label= value= example=CLICK [3113]
<action>
CLICK [3113]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=searchbox target_label=Find a location value=Boston example=TYPE [6068] [Boston]
<action>
TYPE [6068] [Boston]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=span target_label=Boston value= example=CLICK [10413]
<action>
CLICK [10413]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=svg target_label= value= example=CLICK [12210]
<action>
CLICK [12210]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=button target_label=18 value= example=CLICK [18663]
<action>
CLICK [18663]
</action>
 - SELECT target_role=combobox target_label=Time value=5 00 PM example=SELECT [28709] [5 00 PM]
<action>
SELECT [28709] [5 00 PM]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=svg target_label= value= example=CLICK [31817]
<action>
CLICK [31817]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=span target_label=2 guests value= example=CLICK [34711]
<action>
CLICK [34711]
</action>
 - SELECT target_role=combobox target_label=Size value=1 guest example=SELECT [36974] [1 guest]
<action>

## enterprise / Car rental workflow 3
Source: Mind2Web exemplar
Website: enterprise
Domain: Travel
Subdomain: Car rental
Goal pattern: Sign Allan Smith for email offers with the email allan.smith@gmail.com and zip code 10001
Structured steps:
 - CLICK target_role=a target_label= value= example=CLICK [134]
<action>
CLICK [134]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=First Name (required value=Allan example=TYPE [11031] [Allan]
<action>
TYPE [11031] [Allan]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=Last Name (required value=Smith example=TYPE [21847] [Smith]
<action>
TYPE [21847] [Smith]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=Email Address (required value=allan.smith@gmail.com example=TYPE [32673] [allan.smith@gmail.com]
<action>
TYPE [32673] [allan.smith@gmail.com]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=Confirm Email Address (required value=allan.smith@gmail.com example=TYPE [43500] [allan.smith@gmail.com]
<action>
TYPE [43500] [allan.smith@gmail.com]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=ZIP Code (required value=10001 example=TYPE [54343] [10001]
<action>
TYPE [54343] [10001]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=button target_label=Submit value= example=CLICK [65163]
<action>
CLICK [65163]
</action>

Website: bookdepository
Domain: Shopping
Subdomain: Speciality
Goal pattern: Show status of my order with order number X123456789 and email buckeye.foobar@gmail.com
Structured steps:
 - CLICK target_role=link target_label=🚚Order Status value= example=CLICK [98]
<action>
CLICK [98]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=Order number * value=X123456789 example=TYPE [17940] [X123456789]
<action>
TYPE [17940] [X123456789]
</action>
 - TYPE target_role=textbox target_label=E-mail used on order * value=buckeye.foobar@gmail.com example=TYPE [22288] [buckeye.foobar@gmail.com]
<action>
TYPE [22288] [buckeye.foobar@gmail.com]
</action>
 - CLICK target_role=button target_label=View value= example=CLICK [26636]
<action>
CLICK [26636]
</action>
